work_package.title: Codify Viewport Inheritance and Reset Decision Matrix
work_package.current_state: Viewport inheritance/reset decision matrix, fixtures, validator, documentation, and CI wiring are completed through PR #160 and PR #161.
work_package.target_state: Viewport inheritance and reset decisions are documented and validation-backed as input and strategy boundaries, not live responsive correctness evidence.

measurable_current_state.statement: Viewport inheritance/reset decision matrix, fixtures, validator, documentation, and CI wiring are completed through PR #160 and PR #161.
measurable_current_state.measurement: Measured by contract, schema, validator, fixture, CI, STATUS, and documentation coverage for this package.

measurable_target_state.statement: Viewport inheritance and reset decisions are documented and validation-backed as input and strategy boundaries, not live responsive correctness evidence.
measurable_target_state.measurement: Accepted when contract, schema, fixture, validator, CI, documentation, and STATUS signals align without stronger evidence claims.

target_capability.statement: Viewport inheritance and reset decision handling is deterministic, contract-backed, fixture-covered, and CI-visible.
target_capability.measurement: Measured by deterministic validator and CI-visible checks plus documented contract boundaries.

work_package.expected_project_delta: Repository gains a clear viewport inheritance and reset decision matrix that supports safer responsive strategy routing while preserving false readiness and evidence claims.
allowed_work: Clarify viewport inheritance and reset contract expectations.
Add or harden focused fixtures for allowed and blocked inheritance/reset states.
Improve validator diagnostics where existing validators own the behavior.
forbidden_work: Do not create submitted evidence unless explicitly authorized by the repository owner and current Issue #8 submitted-mode contracts.
Do not mutate Issue #8 or mark Issue #8 evidence as satisfied.
Do not run or authorize real pilot execution.
Do not claim production_ready, release_ready, live_render_validated, export_json_validated, accessibility_passed, pixel_perfect, or responsive_correctness_validated.
Do not treat CI success, merged PRs, catalog completion, Work Package completion, or queue completion as domain evidence.
must_deliver: Focused valid/invalid fixture coverage for inheritance and reset boundaries.
Validator diagnostics that keep the result within repository-check evidence.
must_preserve: Rolling queue remains a historical reconciled archive, not the execution driver.
Controller selection must come only from planning/EV4_AUTOMATION_WORK_PACKAGE_CATALOG.json.
Quality gates, CI, review, and evidence boundaries remain mandatory.
Technical evidence claims remain false unless real evidence gates pass.
Catalog replenishment is state-driven and must not block active Work Package execution.
Catalog replenishment must respect the single-active-mutation-PR policy.
definition_of_done: The measurable target state is met by schema-backed or validator-backed repository evidence.
The selected PR slice remains reviewable and stays under this Work Package ID.
No submitted evidence, Issue #8 mutation, pilot authorization, or forbidden readiness claim is produced by the Work Package.

split_rule.principle: A Work Package may be large in objective, but each PR must remain reviewable.

allowed_pr_slices.title: decision matrix contract
allowed_pr_slices.objective: Document the viewport inheritance and reset decision matrix boundaries.
allowed_pr_slices.review_boundary: Reviewable PR slice under the same Work Package ID; no unrelated micro-objective may be introduced.

allowed_pr_slices.title: matrix fixtures and validator
allowed_pr_slices.objective: Add or harden fixture and validator coverage for inheritance and reset decisions.
allowed_pr_slices.review_boundary: Reviewable PR slice under the same Work Package ID; no unrelated micro-objective may be introduced.

blocked_if: The slice would claim live responsive correctness or pixel-perfect rendering.
Required viewport contract source is missing or ambiguous.
completion_record_requirements: Record selected Work Package ID and PR slice ID in the PR body.
List files changed, validators changed, and CI commands run.
State commands not run and why.
Record whether catalog replenishment was checked and whether it was non-mutating, same-PR in-scope, or blocked by single-active-PR policy.
Record remaining risks and the next safe human action.
